checkedAway.other: I completed {count} watch checks while you were away.

home.checkedSummary: I checked {count} things while you were away.
home.controlSummary: Everything else is already under control.

watches.title: All watches
watches.intro: Review the watch list and open any item for more context.
watches.empty: Everything is under control. No active watches right now.

detail.title: Watch detail
detail.preparingCopy: I’m analysing your request and performing the first monitoring check.
detail.deleteCopy: This will permanently stop monitoring and remove this Watch.
detail.notFoundCopy: We could not find that watch. Please return to the watch list.

newWatch.heading: What should I keep an eye on?
newWatch.label: What should I keep an eye on?
newWatch.urlShortcut: Or paste a URL to follow a story
newWatch.urlHelp: Share any article or page directly from another app.
newWatch.urlDetected: URL detected — this page can be followed as a story.
newWatch.urlReviewHelp: Help me by editing the information below.
newWatch.emptyError: Tell me what you would like me to watch.
newWatch.meaningfulError: Please add a little more detail.

flow2.headline: Tell us what matters.
flow2.subheadline: We’ll tell you when it matters.
flow2.supporting: You stop checking. We’ll keep watching.
flow2.examplesTitle: The things you want to know
flow2.exampleOne: Tell me when EasyJet releases Christmas flights.
flow2.exampleTwo: Follow this news story and tell me when something important changes.
flow2.exampleThree: Notify me when a property matching my criteria appears.
flow2.exampleFour: Let me know when Metallica announces a European tour.
flow2.exampleFive: Notify me when Apple publishes its annual results.

flow3.checkingExamplesLabel: Examples of things people keep checking
flow3.checkingExampleOne: When EasyJet releases Christmas flights to London.
flow3.checkingExampleTwo: A property matching your criteria is listed.
flow3.checkingExampleThree: Updates to a news story you're following.
flow3.checkingExampleFour: An Amazon product drops below your target price.
flow3.checkingExampleSix: Changes to tax or business regulations.
flow3.checkingExampleSeven: A competitor launches a new product.
flow3.solutionOpening: That’s a lot to keep track of.
flow3.solutionRelief: And let you know when it matters.

followStory.title: Followed investigation
followStory.intro: A new update is available for your tracked supply chain story.
followStory.understoodCopy: The investigation shows that airport staff shortages are affecting cargo flow for holiday deliveries, which may impact the products you care about.

monitoringSummaries.release: Watching for an official release announcement.
monitoringSummaries.price: Watching for a price change that matches your target.
monitoringSummaries.travel: Watching for a new availability or schedule announcement.
monitoringSummaries.news: Watching for the next meaningful development.
monitoringSummaries.event: Watching for an official date or availability announcement.
monitoringSummaries.story: Watching for meaningful changes to this story.
monitoringSummaries.general: Watching for the first meaningful update.

pendingSituations.general: No meaningful update has been detected yet.

watch-001.title: EasyJet Christmas flights
watch-001.request: Tell me when EasyJet opens Christmas flights to Barcelona
watch-001.monitoringSummary: Watching for EasyJet’s Christmas flight schedule to Barcelona.
watch-001.latestChange: Christmas flights to Barcelona opened this morning.
watch-001.currentSituation: Christmas flights from London Gatwick to Barcelona opened this morning at 6:14 AM. Prices currently start at £89 each way.
watch-001.recommendation: Book now. Prices on this route typically climb 40–60% within 48 hours of opening. The best seats go first.
watch-001.whyToday: EasyJet published its Christmas schedule this morning.
watch-001.whyFollowing: “You mentioned wanting to visit your family in Barcelona over Christmas and asked me to alert you the moment tickets opened so you could book before prices climb.”
watch-001.timelineOne: You asked me to watch for Christmas flights
watch-001.timelineTwo: Winter schedule released — Christmas not yet available

watch-002.title: Stranger Things Season 6
watch-002.request: Keep me updated about Stranger Things Season 6
watch-002.monitoringSummary: Watching for official release dates, trailers and major announcements.
watch-002.currentSituation: Netflix has officially announced the release date for the next season.
watch-002.recommendation: Add the date to your calendar and watch for the first full trailer.
watch-002.whyToday: Netflix confirmed the release date today.

watch-003.title: Nice apartment under €350,000
watch-003.request: Find me a nice apartment in Nice under €350,000
watch-003.monitoringSummary: Watching for new listings in Nice under €350,000.
watch-003.latestChange: A new property matching your criteria has been listed.
watch-003.currentSituation: A new apartment in Nice has been listed within your target budget.
watch-003.recommendation: Review the listing quickly and arrange a viewing if the location and condition match your criteria.
watch-003.whyToday: A matching property was added today.
